allow: PowerShell(docker exec api_container uv add django-unfold 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec api_container python -c "import parler.admin; import inspect; print\([x for x in dir\(parler.admin\) if 'nline' in x]\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec api_container python manage.py shell --settings=mysite.settings.local -c "import parler.admin; print\([x for x in dir\(parler.admin\) if 'nline' in x.lower\(\)]\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec api_container python manage.py check --settings=mysite.settings.local 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec api_container python manage.py makemigrations --settings=mysite.settings.local --no-input 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec api_container python manage.py dumpdata --settings=mysite.settings.local --natural-foreign --natural-primary --exclude auth.permission --exclude contenttypes --indent 2 -o new_dump.json 2>&1)
